taxon.author: (O. Pickard-Cambridge, 1872)
taxon.distribution: North Africa, Greece, Cyprus, Turkey, Azerbaijan, Middle East, India, China, Korea, Japan. Introduced to USA, Caribbean, Venezuela, Cape Verde, South Africa, Mauritius

referenceObject.reference: Pickard-Cambridge, O. (1872). General list of the spiders of Palestine and Syria, with descriptions of numerous new species, and characters of two new genera. Proceedings of the Zoological Society of London 40(1): 212-354, pl. 13-16. doi: 10.1111/j.1469-7998.1872.tb00489.x
